name: Freedom Charter & Limousine LL
recent_news: No web presence or news found; appears to be a micro charter/limo operator with no school-bus contracts.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target: limo/charter micro-operator (4 employees, ~$230K revenue), no school-bus service indicated; below platform scale and outside core SPED/yellow-bus scope.

name: Greenbrier Valley Limousine
recent_news: Operates as 'Greenbrier Limo' out of Greenbrier Valley Airport in Lewisburg, WV. Offers a 7-passenger Ford Expedition and stretch limo for weddings, airport, corporate and prom trips. Explicit disclaimer that vans do not meet Federal Bus Safety Standards and will not transport K-12 students.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target: single-vehicle airport limo, explicitly does not transport K-12 students; no yellow-bus or SPED operation.

name: Affordable Senior Transport
recent_news: No company website or news located. Name and area code (715, western WI) suggest a senior/medical micro-transport operator, not a school-bus contractor. Eau Claire-area student transportation is handled by Student Transit (since 1939), not this entity.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target: appears to be a senior/NEMT micro-operator with no school-bus service; below scale and outside core scope.

name: CEO Limousine Svc
recent_news: Listed on a party vendors directory in Lake Geneva, WI. Lake Geneva J1 / Badger HS student transportation is contracted to Dousman Transport Company, not CEO Limousine.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target: limo micro-operator with no school-bus contracts; Lake Geneva student transport handled by Dousman.

name: Hi Life Limousine
recent_news: No dedicated web presence located; appears to be a small limo operator in Delavan, WI. Delavan-Darien school transportation is served by Dousman Transport Company, not Hi Life Limousine.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target: limo micro-operator (4 employees, ~$215K revenue) with no school-bus service; Delavan-area student transport handled by Dousman.
